strengths: 18+ years of fullstack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js depth in recent roles (re:cinq, Optilyz, RIDE)
Hands-on AI agent development experience — MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at current role
Proven testing culture: TDD practitioner, built test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), taught testing courses
concerns: No Nest.js experience mentioned anywhere on the resume
Frontend depth leans toward Ember.js; React evidence limited to one role (Optilyz)
No Kotlin and no Python listed; Java exposure appears dated (Altom, 2016-2018)
response.justification: The core competencies for this role are TypeScript/Node fullstack engineering, React, testing expertise, cloud/containerization, databases, and AI agent development. The candidate exceeds the 6+ year bar with strong recent TypeScript/Node work (re:cinq, RIDE, Optilyz), used React with MongoDB and AWS CDK at Optilyz, runs a Kubernetes-deployed platform (GISCollective), and directly builds MCP/AI-agent tooling today — a rare, explicitly required skill. Testing competency is exceptionally evidenced (TDD at RIDE, authored test libraries, Selenium courses). Gaps are Nest.js (absent), Kotlin/Python (absent), and modest React depth relative to Ember. Security/auth work is implied but not explicitly cited. Strong evidence on most high-weight competencies with learnable framework gaps supports a hire recommendation.
